labels.analysis: The MCP Server "Canvs" provides 13 tools focused on data analysis & processing tasks. Core capabilities include creation and generation, data access and reading, deletion and cleanup, modification and updates. Key tools: get_guide, add_elements, update_elements, delete_elements, query_elements.
labels.reasoning: Primary label "Data Analysis & Processing" assigned based on strong keyword matches in tool names and descriptions: chart.

tools.name: get_guide
tools.description: ⚠️ MANDATORY FIRST STEP - Call this tool BEFORE using any other Canvs tools! Returns comprehensive instructions for creating whiteboards: tool selection strategy, iterative workflow, and examples. Following these instructions ensures correct diagrams.

tools.name: add_elements
tools.description: Main method for creating canvas and adding elements. ⚠️ IMPORTANT: Call get_guide first and follow its instructions! If room_url is NOT provided - creates a NEW canvas and returns room_url. If room_url IS provided - adds elements to that canvas. IMPORTANT: When creating new canvas, ALWAYS include room_url in your response to the user! Element types: rectangle, ellipse, diamond, text, arrow, line. TEXT IN SHAPES: use containerId on text element pointing to shape id. ARROWS: Position at EDGE of source shape. Auto-bound within 30px. Colors: strokeColor, backgroundColor (hex).

room_url.description: Room URL or ID. If not provided, creates a new canvas

elements.description: Array of element definitions to create

id.description: Unique element ID. IMPORTANT: Always set explicit IDs for shapes that arrows will connect to!

backgroundColor.description: Fill color in hex or 'transparent' (default: transparent)

fillStyle.description: Fill style: solid, hachure, cross-hatch (default: solid)

points.description: Points array for arrows/lines. Relative to element x,y. Example: [[0,0],[0,100]] for vertical arrow

containerId.description: Container element ID (for text bound to shapes). Set x,y to 0,0 for auto-centering

startBinding.description: For arrows: bind start point to a shape. REQUIRED for connected diagrams!

elementId.description: ID of shape to connect to (REQUIRED)

gap.description: Gap from shape edge in pixels (default: 8)

endBinding.description: For arrows: bind end point to a shape. REQUIRED for connected diagrams!

elementId.description: ID of shape to connect to (REQUIRED)

gap.description: Gap from shape edge in pixels (default: 8)

label.description: For arrows: text label displayed on the arrow

timeout.description: Room lifetime in seconds (default: 3600, max: 86400). Only used when creating new canvas

isNew.description: Whether a new canvas was created

tools.name: update_elements
tools.description: Update elements on a canvas. Requires room_url from add_elements. Pass elements array with id and fields to update.

room_url.description: Room URL (from create_canvas) or room ID to operate on

elements.description: Array of element updates (each must have id)

isNew.description: Whether a new canvas was created

tools.name: delete_elements
tools.description: Delete elements from a canvas. Requires room_url from add_elements. Pass ids array of element IDs to delete.

room_url.description: Room URL (from create_canvas) or room ID to operate on

ids.description: Array of element IDs to delete

isNew.description: Whether a new canvas was created

tools.name: query_elements
tools.description: Query elements on a canvas. Requires room_url from add_elements. Returns elements matching optional filters.

room_url.description: Room URL (from create_canvas) or room ID to operate on

tools.name: group_elements
tools.description: Group elements on a canvas. Requires room_url from add_elements.

room_url.description: Room URL (from create_canvas) or room ID to operate on

elementIds.description: Array of element IDs to group

isNew.description: Whether a new canvas was created

tools.name: ungroup_elements
tools.description: Ungroup elements on a canvas. Pass element IDs — all groups containing those elements will be removed. Requires room_url from add_elements.

room_url.description: Room URL (from create_canvas) or room ID to operate on

elementIds.description: Array of element IDs to ungroup

isNew.description: Whether a new canvas was created

tools.name: align_elements
tools.description: Align elements on a canvas. Requires room_url from add_elements.

room_url.description: Room URL (from create_canvas) or room ID to operate on

elementIds.description: Array of element IDs to align

isNew.description: Whether a new canvas was created

tools.name: distribute_elements
tools.description: Lay out elements sequentially without overlapping, with a 10% gap between each pair. First element stays as anchor, others are placed after it. Requires room_url from add_elements.

room_url.description: Room URL (from create_canvas) or room ID to operate on

elementIds.description: Array of element IDs to distribute

isNew.description: Whether a new canvas was created

tools.name: lock_elements
tools.description: Lock elements on a canvas. Requires room_url from add_elements.

room_url.description: Room URL (from create_canvas) or room ID to operate on

elementIds.description: Array of element IDs to lock

isNew.description: Whether a new canvas was created

tools.name: unlock_elements
tools.description: Unlock elements on a canvas. Requires room_url from add_elements.

room_url.description: Room URL (from create_canvas) or room ID to operate on

elementIds.description: Array of element IDs to unlock

isNew.description: Whether a new canvas was created

tools.name: add_elements_from_mermaid
tools.description:
Add elements from Mermaid diagram. ⚠️ IMPORTANT: Call get_guide first and follow its instructions! If room_url is NOT provided - creates a NEW canvas and returns room_url. If room_url IS provided - adds diagram elements to that canvas. IMPORTANT: When creating new canvas, ALWAYS include room_url in your response to the user! Supports Flowchart, Sequence, and Class diagrams. FLOWCHART EXAMPLE: "flowchart TD
  A[Start] --> B{Decision}
  B -->|Yes| C[OK]
  B -->|No| D[Cancel]" SEQUENCE EXAMPLE: "sequenceDiagram
  Alice->>Bob: Hello
  Bob-->>Alice: Hi" CLASS EXAMPLE: "classDiagram
  class Animal{
    +name: string
    +eat()
  }
  Animal <|-- Dog"

room_url.description: Room URL or ID. If not provided, creates a new canvas

mermaid.description: Mermaid diagram definition (flowchart, sequence, or class diagram)

curve.description: Curve style for flowchart edges (default: linear)

maxEdges.description: Maximum number of edges to render (default: 1000)

timeout.description: Room lifetime in seconds (default: 3600, max: 86400). Only used when creating new canvas

isNew.description: Whether a new canvas was created

tools.name: get_image
tools.description: Get SVG render of the canvas from the browser. Requires an active browser session.

room_url.description: Room URL (from create_canvas) or room ID to operate on
